mapper.sql: id, name_zh, name_ja, name_en, slug, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_tag WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY name_zh ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM t_tag WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_tag WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tag SET name_zh = #{tag.nameZh}, name_ja = #{tag.nameJa}, name_en = #{tag.nameEn}, slug = #{tag.slug}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{tag.id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM t_article_tag article_tag INNER JOIN t_article article ON article.id = article_tag.article_id WHERE article_tag.tag_id = #{tagId} AND article.deleted = 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tag SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, updated_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
